questions.question: Spot the error: 'He don't / know / the answer / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'He' needs 'doesn't', not 'don't'. Step 2: Error in part 1. Answer: He don't.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'She is / senior than / me / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'senior' takes 'to', not 'than'. Step 2: Error in part 2. Answer: senior than.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'I have been / living here / since five years / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: Duration uses 'for', not 'since'. Step 2: 'for five years'. Answer: since five years.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'Each of the girls / have / a book / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'Each' is singular → 'has'. Step 2: Error: have. Answer: have.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'The furniture / are / expensive / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'furniture' is uncountable singular. Step 2: 'is expensive'. Answer: are.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'He insisted / to pay / the bill / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'insist on' + gerund, not 'insist to'. Step 2: 'insisted on paying'. Answer: to pay.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'Neither of the / answers are / correct / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'Neither' is singular → 'is'. Step 2: 'answers is' → 'answer is'. Answer: answers are.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'I prefer / tea than / coffee / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: 'prefer X to Y'. Step 2: 'tea to coffee'. Answer: tea than.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'One of the boys / were / absent / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: One of → singular verb. Step 2: Error in 'were'. Answer: were.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'She is / more smarter / than him / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: Double comparative error. Step 2: Error in 'more smarter'. Answer: more.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'He did not / gave / up / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: did not + base verb. Step 2: Error in 'gave'. Answer: gave.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'The team / are / playing well / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: Collective as unit → is (AmE). Step 2: Error in 'are'. Answer: are.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'I am / looking forward to / meet you / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: look forward to + -ing. Step 2: Error in 'meet'. Answer: meet.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'He has less / friends / than I / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: Countable → fewer. Step 2: Error in 'less'. Answer: less.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'She told / that / she was tired / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: told + object, no 'that' after told alone. Step 2: Error in 'that'. Answer: that.
questions.trick: told + object, no 'that' after told alone.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'Enter into / the room / quietly / (No error)'
questions.solution: Step 1: enter a room (no 'into'). Step 2: Error in 'Enter into'. Answer: Enter.
